text: MNC mein meri salary aate hi gaon se call aaya ki be-mausam baarish se fasal barbaad ho gayi hai, toh maine apni saari savings remittance mein bhej di. strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence of the eventual breaking point using Lens E.
text: Toh asal mein yeh sirf aaj ke bil ka darr nahi hai, balki us din ka khauf hai jab resources bilkul khatam ho jayenge aur unhe achanak ek bada jhatka lagega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul yahi. Ek taraf gaon mein unka stress kam karna hai, aur doosri taraf yahan main financially barbaad ho raha hoon. Mera poora dimaag ab kaam karna band kar chuka hai, do naaw par pair rakh kar main doobne wala hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Named the unexpressed feeling of being trapped and helpless arising from Relational Preservation.
text: Mujhe mehsoos ho raha hai ki tum khud ko is waqt buri tarah phasa hua aur TRAPPED pa rahe ho, jaise koi rasta hi na bacha ho apne aur unke beech ek balance banane ka.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa hi hai. WFH mein laptop ke aage baith kar smile karta hoon meetings mein, aur andar hi andar dimag mein calculations chalti rehti hain ki is mahine ka minimum due aur rent ek saath kaise niklega.

strategy_intent: Validated the exhaustion as culturally normal for metro migrants supporting rural families.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par baki mere colleagues toh manage kar rahe hain. Nayi gaadiyan le rahe hain aur main bas interest bhar bhar ke khud ko bewakoof bana raha hoon. Kaisa professional hoon main jise personal finance hi nahi aata.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Seeker

text: Unki ek tasalli aur shaan ko bachane ke khatir, tumne sahukaar ki kadi baatein tak sehna sweekar kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sweekar toh kar liya hai, par andar se toot chuka hoon. Samajh nahi aata kab tak aise jhooth bol kar zindagi chalegi. Thak gaya hoon andar hi andar ghut kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the core unexpressed feeling of being entirely trapped by the situation.
text: Mujhe lagta hai ki tum in doہری zimmedariyon ke beech poori tarah se trapped aur majboor mehsoos kar rahe ho, jahan aage peeche koi raasta nahi dikh raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sahi bole aap. Majboori hi toh hai. Paise ped pe toh ugate nahi pardes mein. Phir uper se khet ka nuksan alag se kha gaya hamein is baar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their feeling of helplessness as a normal reaction to systemic agricultural and debt issues, not a personal failing.
text: Tumhara yeh helpless aur majboor mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai. Fasal ke achanak nuksan aur karz ke dabaav mein koi bhi aam insaan aise hi ghir jata hai, yeh tumhari nakami bilkul nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dil ko thodi tasalli milti hai aapki baat sunkar. Par main baap ka sar panchayat mein jhukte hue nahi dekh sakta. Sahukaar ka kist kal tak dena zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a systemic anecdote to reduce isolation and normalize the migrant burden.
text: Pardes mein kamane wale bhaiyon mein apne dard ko chupana aur gaon izzat ke liye paise bhejna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka haal nahi, lekin koi asani se bolega nahi kyunki samaj usko kamzori maan leta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat bilkul sau aane sach kaho aapne. Mard ho toh saara dard chupchap piyo, yahi sikha hai humne. Par akele mein bohot ghutan hoti hai aur rona aata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the implicit fear of the facade breaking and the consequences it would have (Lens E).
text: Andar hi andar tumhe yeh khauf bhi khaye ja raha hai ki agar kisi din yeh sab sacchai bahar aa gayi, toh tumhare ghar walon par kya guzregi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Darr toh bohot lagta hai us din ka soch kar. Par ab mujhe is karz ke jaal se kisi tarah bahar nikalna hi hoga. Batao kya karoon aage main, kuch samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering practical, context-appropriate options for immediate relief from the looming debt installment.
text: Is waqt do chhote kadam soch sakte hain. Pehla, kya tum sahukaar ke paas ja kar use majboori samjha kar is hafte ki kist thodi kam karne ki mohlat maang sakte ho? Ya phir theke par jin bharosemand doston ke sath kaam karte ho, unse ek choti madad mang kar agla hafta nikal sakte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Doston se udhaar lena mushkil hai, sab mere jaise hi lachar majdoor hain. Sahukaar se jaa kar minnat karne ki koshish kar sakta hoon kal, shayad thoda waqt de de mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen step to make it feel manageable and less overwhelming.
text: Pehle bas us sahukaar ke paas jao aur apni aadhi kist dene ki baat rakh kar waqt mango... uske baad jo hoga us par vichar karenge... bas itna hi aaj ke liye socho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main kal subah theke par jaane se pehle uske paas jaunga. Par man mein bohot dar hai ki wo zor se gussa na kare aur meri bebasi ka mazak na udaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the moneylender's aggression as a systemic tactic, reframing the Seeker's fear.
text: Gaon ka structure aur sahukaari system dono aapas mein is tarah jude hote hain ki ek majdoor ko hamesha dar aur dabaav mein rakhein, unka gussa karna unka tareeqa hai, tumhari galti nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat toh pate ki kahi aapne. Wo chahte hi hain ki hum humesha dabbe aur darre rahein. Par agar parivaar ko chalana hai, toh mujhe ghabrahat chhod kar himmat karni padegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring their newfound resolve to face the situation for the sake of their family (Lens C).
text: Apne parivaar ko bachate hue ab tumne us darr ka samna karne ke liye ek nayi himmat juta li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyuki agar main toot gaya toh piche parivaar toh waise bhi barbaad ho jayega na. Mera theek rehna aur in pareshaniyo se ladna zaroori hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting the Seeker to mentally prepare and formulate their words for the upcoming interaction.
text: Toh kal subah jab sahukaar ke saamne khade hoge, toh khud ko majboot rakhne ke liye apne mann mein kya kahoge us waqt?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi sochunga ki main chor nahi hoon, waqt thoda kharab chal raha hai kheti ki wajah se, aur meri neeyat saaf hai ki main paise wapas zaroor karunga mehnat se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the Seeker's honest intentions and self-worth despite the economic struggle.
text: Yeh ek bohot sachchi aur majboot soch hai, tum waqt ke maare zarur ho sakte ho par tumhari imaandari aur neeyat ki koi keemat nahi laga sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya bhai. Pehli baar lag raha hai ki mera itna lamba dukh koi asal mein samajh raha hai, bina mujhe judge kiye ya mere gaon ki ijaat par tana maare.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relief of breaking their long isolation and sharing their burden (Lens D).
text: Itne lambe arse ke baad apni is kathin ladai ko kisi ke sath baant kar, andar ek sukoon aur thehraav sa mehsoos ho raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi mein bhai. Chula jalane aur karz ki fikar abhi bhi hai, par aaj ki baat ke baad shayad raat ko theek se so paunga main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the feeling of lightness and regained peace after unburdening their stress.
text: Lag raha hai ki tumhare kaandhon par jama hua karz aur farz ka wo bhaari bojh, is khuli baat-cheet se kaafi had tak halka ho gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Halka zarur hua hai. Akele pan mein chize aur jyada bhayanak lagti hain. Kal ka din aur sahukaar ka samna ab utna dravna nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the shift in perspective from being overwhelmed to feeling capable of executing their role responsibly (Lens B).
text: Ek akele bebus majdoor ki tarah nahi, balki ab tum is uljhan ko apne parivaar ke mukhiya ki tarah ek nayi samajh ke sath suljhane ja rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdam. Kal ja kar usse samay mangta hoon aur baki apne kharche mein aur katoti karunga. Rasta nikal hi aayega dheere dheere.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating their capacity to handle the journey ahead and providing closure.
text: Tumhari yeh nayi shuruaat aur kathinaiyon mein bhi rasta dhoondhne ki takat, aage chal kar tumhare liye aur ghar walo ke liye sachcha sahara banegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mummy ki dawai aur loan installment ke liye maine apni saari savings wiped kar di aur ghar bhej di, par unhe kabhi nahi jataya ki main kitni takleef mein hoon. 'Log kya kahenge' agar bade bete ne remittance bhejni band kar di, isi darr se main apni financial precarity chhupaye rakhta hoon. Unke samne hamesha muskurata hoon taaki unhe lage ki unka kisan beta shehar mein bohot khush hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational element of hiding reality to protect the family from worry.
text: Aapko andar hi andar itni takleef jhelni pad rahi hai, par ghar walon ko aur zyada pareshan na karne ke darr se aap apni sachai unse poori tarah chhupa rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, agar sachai bataunga toh gaon mein sab pareshan ho jayenge. Upar se 'log kya kahenge' ki kheti chhod ke shehar gaya aur waha se ek remittance bhi nahi bhej pa raha. Pura ghar abhi mujh par hi depend karta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the implied fear of societal judgment that forces the Seeker to keep quiet.
text: Yeh jo samaj aur gaon walo ki baaton ka darr hai, yahi aapko khud ko rokne aur chup rehne par majboor kar deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi mein, bohot akela lagta hai yahan. Is bade shehar mein rent aur factory ka kaam dono maarte hain. Par kist ka time aata hai toh saara paisa bhej deta hoon. Khud ka pet kaat ke sab kar raha hoon, kisi se keh bhi nahi sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the prolonged duration of suffering following the stigma cue with a soft pause.
text: Itne lambe samay se akele is shehar mein apna pet kaat kar sab kuch sambhalna sach mein bahut bhari padta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhari toh hai, par koi aur rasta bhi nahi dikhta. Agar maine remittance bhejni band kar di toh 'log kya kahenge' yeh soch kar sab chup chap sehta hoon. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai yahan se kahin door bhaag jaun par kahan jaunga?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the mild risk thought warmly before naming the core conflict of feeling trapped.
text: Aise akelepan mein door chale jane ka khayal aana bahut natural hai. Mujhe lagta hai ki in zimmedariyon aur parivaar ki izzat bachane ke beech, aap khud ko poori tarah se fasa hua aur majboor mehsoos kar rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum fasa hua. Saara din kaam karta hoon, overtime bhi marta hoon. Phir bhi mahine ke aakhir mein mere haath khali hote hain. Mere dukh ki shayad kisi ko padi nahi hai, bas paisa time pe gaon pohachna chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the feeling of isolation and frame it within the systemic expectations placed on migrant sons.
text: Aapne jo majboori aur akelepan ka zikra kiya, yeh mehsus karna bilkul valid hai. Hamare system mein aksar shehar aaye beton se yehi asha ki jati hai ki woh chupchap kamate rahein, par iska matlab yeh nahi ki aapki khud ki koi ahmiyat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ahmiyat bas ATM machine jaisi ban gayi hai meri. Mummy ki dawai zaroori hai, karz ki installment zaroori hai. Par main itna thak gaya hoon dikhawa karte karte. Phone par muskurata hoon, par akele room mein aakar rone ka man karta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the burden without offering a solution.
text: Aap jaise migrant workers ki zindagi mein yeh hamesha muskurate rehne ka mukhauta lagana bahut common hai — sirf aap akele nahi hain is halat mein, lekin koi bhi iske bare mein khul kar baat nahi karta kyunki sabko ghar walo ki chinta satati hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kaha aapne, koi apna sachcha dard nahi dikhata. Sab andar hi andar ghut rahe hain. Ghar ke loan aur remittance ne himmat tod di hai, par 'log kya kahenge' wali baat dimaag par hamesha khadi rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the heavy duty the Seeker has shouldered stoically.
text: Ek jimmedar bete ki tarah aapne apne parivaar ka itna bada karz aur kharcha bina kisi shikayat ke apne kandho par utha liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par is jimmedari ko nibhate nibhate main andar se poora khali ho gaya hoon. Shehar ka mahol samajhta nahi hai koi yahan. Pura waqt yahi sochta rehta hoon ki aakhir kab tak chalega yeh sab bojha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question to explore how the Seeker currently tries to handle the overwhelming anxiety.
text: Jab raat ko aapka dimag inhi soch aur chintaon mein uljha rehta hai, toh us bechaini ke waqt aap is bojh ko handle karne ke liye kya tasalli dhoondte hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi tasalli dhoond hi nahi pata. Main theek hona chahta hoon aur is paise ke dabaav se thoda sa bahar nikalna chahta hoon. Ab kya karoon jisse gaon mein paise bhi chale jayein aur main bhi yahan thoda theek se jee saku?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 simple actionable options that fit into the Seeker's routine without adding new burdens.
text: Aisi situation mein chhote badlav hi thodi chain de sakte hain. Kya hum aapki agli salary aate hi usme se ek bahut chhota hissa, sirf ek cup chai ya thode behtar nashte ke liye, alag rakhne ka soch sakte hain? Ya phir kisi aise roommate se apne dukh ki chinta share karne ke baare mein soch sakte hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Roommate se baat karna theek nahi, yahan sabka apna hi dukh hai. Par han, chhota hissa alag rakhunga toh shayad loan installment kaise poori hogi? Agar main thoda sa kam bhejunga toh unhe pata lag jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the suggestion into simple, manageable steps for immediate application.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki apni tankha aate hi sirf 100 rupaye ek alag dabbe mein dal do. Phir baaki ke bache hue paiso se apne loan aur ghar ka hisaab banao. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye try karna hai, koi bada cut nahi lagana.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sirf 100 rupaye se shuru kar sakta hoon. Itne kam paise ka farak utna nazar nahi aayega aur main 'log kya kahenge' wali chinta se thoda bach jaunga. Par mujhe guilt zaroor lagega ki main mummy se paise chura raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe self-preservation not as selfishness, but as a systemic necessity to maintain the family structure.
text: Yeh samajhna zaroori hai ki financial tension ke time pe kamanewale ko apni choti zarooraton ko poora karna koi swarth nahi hota. Asal mein lambe samay tak parivaar ka bojh uthane ke liye khud ka theek rehna is poore structure ka ek zaroori hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Baat toh theek keh rahe hain aap. Agar main yahan kamzor pad gaya ya bimar ho gaya, toh unko aage kon paisa bhej payega. Is tarah se maine us 100 rupaye ko nahi dekha tha pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the realization that protecting themselves is functionally protecting the family.
text: Aapki khud ki health aur yahan theek se tike rehna hi darasal aapke parivaar ke behtar kal aur salamati ki sabse mukhya neev hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Main next month se yeh 100 rupaye chup chap alag rakhunga. Kam se kam bimar hone par yeh paisa dawai ke kaam toh aayega. Varna 'log kya kahenge' bolne wale gaon ke log meri sahayata karne yahan thodi aayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the realistic fear of abandonment by society during a crisis, cementing the resolve.
text: Samaj ke jo log aapki family par nazar rakhte hain, aapko achi tarah pata hai ki asal takleef aane par woh log aapki madad karne aage nahi aayenge, aur yahi sachai aapko himmat de rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Ab mujhe thoda sa sahas mil raha hai is naye step ke liye. Main mummy ki dawai ke paise aur loan ki kist utni hi bhejunga, par bache hue mere kharche mein se us 100 rupaye par sirf mera haq hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the strong commitment to the role and the new boundary.
text: Apne bade bete hone ka farz aap aage bhi puri nishtha se nibhayenge, aur ab aap apne khud ke khyal rakhne ka yeh ek naya niyam bhi shuru karne ke liye tyaar hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tayar hoon. Bas darr thoda sa yeh rehta hai ki agar mummy ne kabhi galti se pucha ki remittance thoda kam kyu hai paisa, toh main kya kahunga? Unhe jhoot bolna theek lagega kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the relational dilemma regarding lying versus protecting the mother.
text: Maa ka pyaar aur unka dukh nahi dekh paane ka wahi purana rishta ek pal ke liye phir se is zaroori faisle par aapse sawal karwa raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Karta hai sawal. Par agar sach bata diya ki main yahan rent dekar kabhi kabhi bhookha so raha hoon toh unki himmat bilkul toot jayegi. Jhoot bolkar agar unki tention bach jaye toh wahi sahi rasta hai mere liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the intention behind the lie as an act of care to prevent a feared consequence.
text: Unko kisi bhi aur badi chinta ya takleef se mehfooz rakhne ke liye hi aap is baat ko chupaye rakhne ko unki bhalai ka ek zariya maan rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main isko aise hi manunga. Unka sukh aur shanti bani rahe, aur meri emergency ke kuch paise bhi nikal aaye. Pehli baar 'log kya kahenge' ka pressure thoda kam lag raha hai aapse is baat par khul kar baat karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of stress contrasted with the newfound relief.
text: Itne mahino ki lagatar ghutan aur chinta akele sehne ke baad aaj aapko andar se thoda halkapan mehsoos ho raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein bahut halka lag raha hai. Mujhe nahi lagta tha shehar mein koi gaon walo ki majboori itni achi tarah samjhega. Aapne meri baat itne dhyaan se sun li, mere liye wahi badi baat hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm the immense effort and sacrifice involved in their migrant journey.
text: Aapka akele is anjaan shehar mein akar parivaar ke liye apni saari khushiyan qurban karna aur lagatar mehanat karna koi aasan baat nahi hai, aapki is poori koshish ki main behad qadar karta hoon.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dhanyawad. Ab aaj factory shift pe jana utna bojh nahi lagega dil par. Aaj kam se kam ek thoda sa umeed bhara rasta dikha hai apne bhalai ke liye bhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the ongoing duty alongside the new hope for personal well-being.
text: Kaam par wapas laut-te waqt, ek mehanati bete ki us lagatar duty ke saath-saath ab khud ke liye bache us chhote se raste ki ummeed bhi chal rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bilkul. Thoda lamba rasta hai, par dhire dhire chalta rahunga. Ab main apne un 100 rupaye se thoda safety feel karunga. Aur 'log kya kahenge' wali baat ko side mein rakh kar, pehle apne pet par dhyaan dunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Summarize the positive shift in prioritizing internal needs over external expectations.
text: Ghar walon ki us chinta aur bahari duniyadari se thoda sa bojh hata kar, ab aapne sachai ke sath apne liye ek chhota aur sacha kadam utha liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Parivaar mein kalesh na ho aur badon ka maan bana rahe, bas isiliye main is remittance trap mein ghut raha hoon. Chit fund mein paise doobne ke baad Papa bohot toot gaye thay, isliye maine apni tankhwa ka 90% unhe bhej diya taaki unhe lage ki sab thik hai. Meri apni vehicle EMI bounce ho rahi hai, par unhe ye sach bata kar main unki umeedon ko thokar nahi maar sakta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational focus of protecting the father's dignity at personal cost.
text: Tumhare alfaazon se saaf lag raha hai ki Papa ki toot chuki himmat ko wapas jodne ke liye, tumne apna sab kuch daav par laga diya hai chahe tumhari khud ki EMI hi kyun na bounce ho rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, unka BP pehle hi high rehta hai. Main bas chahta hoon ki ghar pe shanti rahe. Par jab EMI walo ke recovery calls aate hain office ke time pe, toh mera dimaag sunn pad jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duty frame of keeping peace at home despite workplace disruption.
text: Yeh sab akele sambhalna thoda mushkil ho raha hai, jahan ek taraf ghar ki shanti banaye rakhne ki duty hai aur doosri taraf office mein recovery calls ka stress jhelna pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kya karun aur? Bada beta hoon, meri hi responsibility hai na sab theek karna. Par calls avoid karne ke chakkar me main meetings me focus nahi kar paa raha. Manager bhi ghoorta rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explored the specific feeling during the disruptive recovery calls at work.
text: Jab recovery calls aate hain aur meeting ke beech manager notice karta hai, toh us waqt andar se kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot dar lagta hai ki koi colleague na sun le. IT professional ka ek standard maintain karna padta hai bahar. Ek minute lagta hai sari izzat mitti me milne mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence of losing professional respect.
text: Ek taraf job par izzat khone ka darr tumhe laga rehta hai ki kahin logon ke saamne tumhara struggle open na ho jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly yaar. Ek taraf vehicle EMI bounce aur dusri taraf Papa ka vishwas maintain karna. Main puri tarah se phasa hua hoon is loop mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the time duration and the loop of being stuck.
text: Pichle kuch waqt se lagataar is EMI aur family ki expectations ke beech chal rahe is loop ne tumhe thaka diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kai mahinon se chal raha hai yeh sab. Parivaar mein kalesh na ho, isliye main ek word nahi bol sakta kisi ko. Apne doston se milna bhi chhod diya hai maine.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explored the isolation resulting from cutting off friends.
text: Doston se doori banane ke baad, tumhara apne is akelepan ke saath waqt kaise guzarta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut akela aur frustrating. Par main kisi ko bataunga toh kya sochenge? Ek achi MNC me kaam karke bhi apne kharche nahi utha paa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence of judgment (stigma cue detected).
text: Dusron ki nazron ka yeh bojh akele uthana bohot thaka dene wala lagta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... sach mein bahut thak gaya hoon ab toh. Roz subah utho, login karo, remittance bhejo, aur fir bache hue das percent mein jaise taise mahina nikalna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the relational frame of sacrificing everything for family needs.
text: Apne liye sirf thoda sa hissa rakh kar, baki sab ghar walon ko de dena ek bahut bada sacrifice hai jo tum akele kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Parivaar mein kalesh na ho, bas yehi ek thought dimaag me ghoomta hai. Chahe main 2 time khana khau ya ek time, Papa ka maan salamat rehna chahiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explored the internal emotional cost of prioritizing the father's dignity over basic personal needs.
text: Khud ki basic zarooraton ko nazarandaaz karke jab tum Papa ke maan ko sabse upar rakhte ho, toh khud ke andar kaisa feel hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kabhi kabhi sach bolu toh khud pe gussa aata hai. Lekin phir Papa ka chehra yaad aata hai. Chit fund ka loss itna bada tha ki us sadness se wo abhi tak nahi nikle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duty to manage the father's unresolved trauma.
text: Unke us gehre dukh ko kam karne ki zimmedari tumne apne upar is tarah le li hai ki usme tumhara gussa bhi dab ke reh jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahin toh sabse badi dikkat hai. Main apni duty poori kar raha hoon, par andar ek ajeeb sa trap ban gaya hai EMI calls aur Papa ki hopes ke beech.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core feeling of being trapped and helpless between family duty and financial reality.
text: Lagta hai ki in do alag alag duniya ko ek saath sambhalne ki koshish mein, tum khud ko completely trapped aur helpless mehsoos kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Helpless hi toh hai situation. Unhone humari padhai ke liye apni zindagi de di, aur ab jab unka time bura chal raha hai toh main complain kaise kar sakta hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated the exhaustion of balancing a metro job with rural debt expectations.

text: Ek aur baat samajhna zaroori hai. Shehar mein jab hum migrant workers ki tarah aate hain, toh achanak aaye aarthik dabaav aur kiraye ka bojh itna asaan nahi hota; akelepan ka shikaar hona poori tarah swabhavik kadi hai, ye aapki koi niji nakami ya kamzori nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehli baar kisine isey nakami nahi bola. Gaon mein toh sabko lagta hai shehar jake paisa chap rahe hain hum. Aapne sahi kaha, ye shehar ka karcha aur factory ka pressure hi aesa hai. Thoda himmat mil raha hai mujhe aapki in baaton se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the relational shift towards self-compassion.
text: Apne aaspas ke halaat ko naye nazariye se dekhne ke baad, ab lag raha hai ki aap khud ke prati thodi narmi aur himmat mehsoos kar pa rahe hain.

text: Haan, narmi rakhni padegi thodi. Kal room malik kiraya mange aayega, usko haath jod kar thoda time maang lunga. Vo samajhdar admi hai, shayad samajh jaye. Jaan dene se toh behtar hi hai na, ki admi haath pair jod le.

text: Kiraye ke liye haath jodna aapki choti soch ya kamzori nahi dikhata, balki ye aapki samajhdari aur jeene ki zidd ko darshata hai, jo aapke parivaar ke liye sach mein sabse bada aashirwad hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Jeene ki zidd toh karni hi padegi, aakhir maa ki aankhon ka tara jo hoon. Main kal subah hi malik se mil kar baat kar lunga. Agar vo ek hafte ka time de dega toh main over-time karke kuch paisa nikal hi lunga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the feared consequence being actively confronted and managed.
text: Jis izzat ke jaane aur ghar se nikaale jane ka aapko kal tak darr tha, ab us chunauti ka samna aap ek pakke raste aur himmat ke sath karne ko taiyar hain.

text: Bilkul sahi kaha aapne. Khali darr ke aage baithne se bank ki kist thodi nikal jayegi. Ek baat toh aaj ki baat-cheet ne sikhadi, apna dukh andar daba ke khud ko khatam karna koi bahaduri ka kaam nahi hai.

strategy_intent: To provide systemic information regarding farm loan restructuring, giving him a tangible path forward.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the active duty fulfillment without the previous burden of shame.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate the Seeker's actionable resolution and renewed mental strength.

speaker: Supporter

strategy_intent: Highlighting the prolonged duration of enduring this dual life using Lens D.

coping_shade_signal: ghar ki 'shaan' bachane ke liye main ye remittance trap chup-chap seh lunga

text: Aise halaat mein helpless mehoos karna bilkul samajh aata hai; gaon ki izzat aur sahukaar ka pressure jab sar pe ho, toh tum jaise bahut se log apne dukh ko daba kar akele ghutne ko hi apna farz maan lete hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, idhar aake dekha toh mere jaise kai ladke hain, par koi bolta nahi. Sab apne aap ko bada successful dikhate hain. Pata nahi ye dikhawa kab tak chalega, par ander se hum sab is system se poori tarah thak chuke hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used systemic anecdote to normalize the hiding of struggles among migrant workers.
text: Migrants aur city mein kaam karne walo mein apne parivaar ke aage sab theek hone ka dikhawa karna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sabko lagta hai ki kamzori dikhana unki hi galti mani jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Galti kisi ki bhi ho, fas toh main gaya hoon is debt spiral mein. Main thoda theek hona chahta hoon is suffocation se. Aise roz ghut ghut ke nahi jee sakta. Ab kya karoon samajh nahi aa raha aage ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframed the debt trap as a structural issue rather than a personal failure.
text: Sach ye hai ki jo sahukaar ka byaaz aur shehar ka kharcha hai, ye system hi aisa ban gaya hai jisme aadmi apne aap remittance trap mein fas jata hai; ye tumhari akeli ki koi nakami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad ye structure hi galat hai. Par is waqt toh bill mujhe hi bharne hain. Agle mahine ki salary bhi lagbhag poori jayegi. Koi raasta hai kya is pressure ko thoda kam karne ka bina unhe pareshan kiye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided two practical, small-scale suggestions that don't add obligations.
text: Hum do chote steps soch sakte hain jo pressure kam kare. Ek, bank app mein daily transaction limit set karna taaki doston se zyada udhaar lene ki naubat na aaye. Ya doosra, ghar par papa ko sirf itna bolna ki 'is baar company mein thoda issue hai, shayad agle mahine paise kam aayen', bina poori baat bataye.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guided the Seeker through breaking down the next step.
text: Toh pehle yeh karo ki aaj raat papa ko casually message ya choti call pe ek chota sa hint de do... phir apna daily limit app pe set kar lena... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

text: Theek hai. Main aaj raat khana khate waqt call karke bas casually bol dunga. Pata nahi react kaisa karenge, par try toh karna padega nahi toh ye sahukaar aur remittance trap mujhe maar dalenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the feared consequence and the courage to move past it using Lens E.
text: Unke reaction ka thoda darr zaroor hai, par ab tumne us ghutan se bahar nikalne ke liye apne darr ke aage kadam uthane ka tay kar liya hai.

text: Darr toh hai, par usse bada darr ab khud ki halat dekh kar lagta hai. Pata hai, pehle jab bhi bonus milta tha, main party sochta tha, is baar bas rote hue account transfer kiya bina ruke.

speaker: Supporter

text: Tumhara is tarah thaka hua aur helpless mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai. Gaon ki zameen aur metro ka kharcha akele manage karna bahut bada bojh hai, aur yeh tumhari koi personal weakness nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks, par izzat ka sawal hai na. Agar gaon mein pata chala ki ek mehnati kisan ka beta shehar mein khud medical help nahi le pa raha, toh log kya bolenge? Papa ka sir jhuk jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Shares a systemic anecdote to reduce isolation and normalize the migrant professional experience of hiding struggles.
text: Metro cities mein aane wale bahut se first-generation IT professionals mein apni health ignore karke ghar ka debt utarna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki sab pe 'successful beta' dikhne ka pressure hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh. Kabhi lagta hai hum log sirf ATM machines bankar reh gaye hain apne parivaar ke liye. Thoda bura lagta hai aaisa bolne mein, par yahi kadwa sach hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframes the financial and emotional squeeze as a structural mismatch between two different worlds rather than a personal failing.
text: Yeh financial squeeze aur identity ka struggle ek bada structural mismatch hai, jahan rural life ki izzat aur expectations metro life ke hidden costs aur stress se aapas mein takrate hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Ab main kya karoon? Chest pain wapas aa raha hai aur mujhe theek hona hai bina unhe disturb kiye. Koi raasta hai kya aage ka jisse kaam ban jaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offers practical, low-cost options that respect the seeker's need for secrecy and lack of current funds.
text: Aise mein hum do practical raste dekh sakte hain jo zyada cost na badhaye. Pehla, kya tumhari IT company ka health insurance OPD cover deta hai jisse free consultation mil sake? Ya dusra, apne HR portal pe kisi free tele-consult tie-up ke baare mein check kar sakte ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Mera corporate insurance toh hai, par maine kabhi dhyan nahi diya OPD cover pe. Mujhe hamesha lagta tha sirf baday operations ya hospitalization pe milta hai.

speaker: Supporter

text: Pehle apna company ka portal login karke insurance policy ka PDF download karo... phir usme 'OPD benefits' ya 'tele-consultation' wala section search karo... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ye main abhi 5 minute mein check kar sakta hoon WFH desk se hi. Agar free hua toh kam se kam ek basic ECG aur doctor se baat ho jayegi bina paise ke.

strategy_intent: Normalizes the use of corporate resources for discreet care.

coping_shade_signal: dum ghutne laga hai aur dimaag bilkul blank hai
text: Bhaiya, mera dum ghutne laga hai aur main bas raste pe baith kar kaanpne laga hoon. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha, dimaag bilkul blank hai. Ekdum hosh ud gaya hai mera, bas sadak kinare gira hua sa feel kar raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the overwhelming physical sensation of panic without asking for details, while strictly holding the phase for moderate risk check.
text: Aap raste par baithe kaanp rahe hain aur dimaag ekdum blank lag raha hai... Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan thoda theek hu... par aisa lag raha hai jaise andar sab khatam ho gaya. Dum ghutne laga hai, raste se uthne ki himmat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To normalise the mild risk flag warmly and mirror the duration/suddenness of the feeling to invite more context safely.
text: Aise achanak sab theher jane se ghabrahat hona bahut aam baat hai. Yeh jo sab khatam hone wali feeling hai, yeh ekdum se aayi hai ya kaafi time se andar thi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum se hua jab contract khatam hone ka pata chala. Market mein mere paise dub gaye. Khet bech kar Dilli aaya tha, ab sab barbaad ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the feared consequence of losing everything after making such a huge sacrifice, validating the sudden shock.
text: Khet bech kar jo umeed yahan bandhi thi, us contract ke achanak khatam hone se lag raha hai jaise aage ka har raasta band ho gaya.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raasta bacha hi kahan hai? Sahukaar se baat nahi kar sakta. Neighborhood mein 'log kya kahenge' ki gaon se khet bech kar aaya tha. Hosh ud gaya hai mera.

strategy_intent: To strictly follow stigma cue protocol with a shorter restatement ending in a soft pause, focusing on the relational pressure.
text: Izzat ka khayal aur sahukaar ka darr, yeh dono cheezein aapse aage badhne ke raste chheen rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dum ghutne laga hai aur dimaag bilkul blank hai
text: Haan... aur tabhi baar baar mera dum ghutne laga hai aur dimaag bilkul blank hai. Main kisi ko muh dikhane layag nahi bacha hoon ab yahan Dilli mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the relational element of shame and isolation in a big city away from home.
text: Gaon aur wahan ke logon ko yaad karte hi, yeh akelepan ka darr aur badh jata hai ki woh aapke is halat ke baare mein kya sochenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi bola. Par main toh mehnat hi kar raha tha na apni taraf se. Koi chori nahi ki, fir itni badi saza kyun? Samajh nahi aa raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate the Seeker's honest effort, separate their worth from the market failure, and connect to the reality of migration.
text: Aapne apni taraf se puri mehnat ki aur parivaar ke liye gaon chhodne ka bada risk liya. Market mein paisa doobna aapki ghabrahat ki wajah zaroor hai, par yeh aapki mehnat ya niyat ki kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Niyat toh theek thi par nateeja toh zero hi aaya na. Ghar paise bhejne the, ab lagta hai jaise mere upar ek pahaad gir gaya hai sadak par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To accurately name the core unexpressed feeling of exhaustion tied to the heavy burden of being a migrant provider.
text: Lagta hai is akelepan mein, ghar paise bhejne aur izzat bachane ka yeh bhari bojh uthate uthate aap andar se puri tarah thak gaye hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut thak gaya hoon sach mein. Har roz contract bachane ki bhaag-daud... aur gaon walon ki chinta ne hi mera aadha khoon pee liya hai.

text: Is shehar mein, khet aur gaon chhod kar aane wale har mehnatkash insaan ke liye paise aur izzat ka yeh bojha uthana bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj ko sirf kamyabi dikhti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yehi toh sabse bada dard hai, sirf kamyabi dikhti hai logo ko. Pichle kuch dino se dimaag bilkul blank hai mera jab se market down hone laga tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the duration of the distress, highlighting how long the Seeker has been suffering in silence.
text: Toh yeh jo darr tha ki mehnat ki kamai doob sakti hai, yeh pichle kuch dino se hi andar hi andar aapko khaa raha tha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Usi tension mein tha. Lekin ab aage kya karoon? Koi raasta hai kya is sadak se hatne ka? Mujhe sach mein kuch samajh nahi aa raha.

strategy_intent: To offer 2 simple, immediate, and culturally matching physical grounding options suitable for someone experiencing a breakdown on the street.
text: Is waqt jab dimaag ekdum shunn ho, bade faisle lena theek nahi. Abhi ke liye, kya aap thoda paani pee sakte hain, ya aas-paas kisi chai ki tapri par do minute aaram se baith sakte hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aise raste par baithe rehna theek nahi. Main uth kar samne ek tapri hai, wahan chalne ki koshish karta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To walk the Seeker through the single chosen suggestion step by step to break the freezing response.
text: Pehle dheere se uthiye… samne tapri par jaa kar baithiye… aur ek ghoont pani pijiye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye, aur kuch nahi sochna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main baith gaya hoon tapri par. Paani bhi pee liya. Par dimag me baar baar wahi neighborhood wali baat ghoom rahi hai ki badnaami ka kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To provide a systemic reframe normalizing business failure as structural rather than a personal failing of dignity.
text: Market mein jab contract cancel hote hain aur paise doobte hain, toh yeh ek hisab ka nuksan hota hai, aapki insaaniat ya izzat ki nakaami nahi. 'Log kya kahenge' yeh bas ek pressure hai, iska aapse koi lena-dena nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe ho. Ek business fail hua hai, main nahi. Halanki sahukaar ko toh paise lautane hain uski tension hai bahut.

strategy_intent: To gently prompt the Seeker to consider their existing support network for the practical burden.

text: Dost toh idhar ek do hain jo mere jaisa hi contract ka kaam karte hain. Unse bolunga toh wo thoda samjhenge, market down unka bhi hua hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate the intention of seeking community support and reaffirming the Seeker's worth.
text: Aapke doston ne bhi market ke aise utaar-chadav dekhe hain, unse apna darr baantna aapko is Dilli ki bheed mein zaroor thoda hosla dega.

text: Haan, main akele saara bojh le raha tha tabhi achanak breakdown jaisa ho gaya tha. Ab lag raha hai ki akele nahi jhelna padega sab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the relational relief of not carrying the burden alone.
text: Bojh baantne aur doston ka khayal aate hi, aapke is akelepan aur ghabrahat dono mein thodi rahat mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dum ghutne laga hai aur dimaag bilkul blank hai
text: Sahi me kaafi rahat mili. Jo pehle dum ghutne laga hai aur dimaag bilkul blank hai wali halat thi, ab lag raha hai ki dheere dheere koi chhoti naukri karke chuka doonga paise.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reinforce the Seeker's resilience and strong work ethic despite the major setback.
text: Mehnat karna aapki aadat mein hai, aur itni ghabrahat ke baad bhi yeh chote kadam uthane ka faisla aapki pakki niyat aur himmat ko dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Agar wapas khet nahi gaya to gaon me thodi badnaami toh hogi, par mai koshish karunga ki yaha reh ke pehle karz utaar doon. Izzat baad me dekhenge.

strategy_intent: To mirror the shift in priorities away from the feared consequence of shame towards practical debt repayment.
text: Badnaami ka darr abhi bhi hai, par ab aap sahukaar ka karz chukane ko apni pehli zimmedari maan kar us par dhyan lagana chahte hain.

strategy_intent: To provide simple self-soothing options to manage future moments of panic when the Seeker needs courage.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main gehri saans lena zaroor try karunga aage se. Tapri pe aake pani peene se bhi kaafi madad mili waise mujhe, control wapas aa gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To systemically reframe that small steps are effective and migrant workers structurally navigate these harsh realities over time.
text: Jaise ek ghoont paani ne rahat di, waise hi yeh chhote badlav is karz ke bojh ko kam bhari bana denge. Shehar mein mehnat karne wale log waqt ke sath raste nikal hi lete hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne sach kaha bhaiya. Main shant ho gaya hu kaafi. Ab thodi der me apne doston se milta hu aur aage ka thoda bahut plan banata hu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To close with a strong affirmation of the Seeker's courage in facing a very scary moment alone on the street.
text: Aapne aaj darr aur akelepan ka samna badi himmat se kiya hai. Market ke is nuksan se aapki zindagi ruki nahi hai, doston se baat kijiye, aage ka rasta zaroor banega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rona ruk hi nahi raha aur ek ajeeb sa darr hai
text: Mera dimaag blast ho gaya hai. Ghar walon se nazrein churane ke alawa mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha, main bilkul sunn ho chuka hoon. Is emotional flooding mein mujhe kuch bhi sujh nahi raha, bas ek ajeeb sa darr hai jisne mujhe jhakad liya hai aur rona ruk hi nahi raha.

text: Sun ke lag raha hai ki is waqt andar ek bahut bada toofan chal raha hai, jahan sab kuch block sa ho gaya hai aur yeh ajeeb sa darr aapko puri tarah se gher chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rona ruk hi nahi raha aur ek ajeeb sa darr hai
text: Haan bhai, itni buri tarah phans gaya hoon ki bas rona ruk hi nahi raha aur ek ajeeb sa darr hai jo peechha nahi chhod raha. Main akele hi room mein ghut raha hoon.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rona ruk hi nahi raha aur ek ajeeb sa darr hai
text: Kaise karu unka samna? Aaj subah phone par ek message dekha aur uske baad se dhadkan aisi badhi hai ki rona ruk hi nahi raha aur ek ajeeb sa darr hai ki ab kya hoga mere parivaar ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the continuous duration of the distress since seeing the alert.
text: Toh aaj subah jabse woh EMI bounce ka alert aaya hai, tab se lagataar aapke andar yeh barbaadi ka darr aur panic chal raha hai.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Name the underlying grief and loss of belonging connected to the financial loss.

strategy_intent: Guide the Seeker to take one simple step regarding the penalty fear.

speaker: Supporter

strategy_intent: Reinforce positive coping strategies for future use.

text: Mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai aur main yahan anjaan logon ki bheed mein khada bas ro raha hoon. Ek ajeeb sa gehra panic mujhe duba raha hai, main kuch bhi soch nahi paa raha hoon.

strategy_intent: Mirrored the overwhelming emotional flood (Lens F) to validate their panic without pushing for the stressor.

strategy_intent: Mirrored the feared consequence of physical and emotional entrapment (Lens E).

strategy_intent: Reflected the core conflict of being a failed provider leading to a sense of grief and loss of belonging in the city.
text: Lagta hai ki parivar ke hero hone ki umeed tutne aur sheher ke is akelepan mein khud ko phasa hua dekh kar, tum ek bohot gehre grief aur loss of belonging se guzar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha... yahan koi apna nahi hai jisse baat kar saku. Main sirf ek kamane wali machine tha unke liye, aur ab woh bhi band pad gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated their feelings as culturally normal for migrant workers, separating their worth from the market crash.
text: Gaon chhod kar sheher aane wale aur ghar paisa bhejne wale lagbhag sabhi youth par yeh machine banne ka pressure hota hai. Yeh akelapan mehsoos karna bilkul natural hai, par yaad rahe ki market ka girna aur contract ka khatam hona tumhari koshish ya tumhari niyat ki haar bilkul nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi lagta hai ki niyat theek thi meri. Par result toh failure hai na. Metro ke shor mein mera dimaag bilkul sunn ho gaya hai dobara ye sab soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used systemic anecdote to normalize the hidden struggle of metro migrants carrying village debts.
text: Migrant workers mein andar hi andar yeh ghutan aur panic bohot common hai—sirf tumhara nahi, lekin yahan metro mein koi bolega nahi kyunki sab par pichhe gaon paisa bhejne ka ek khaamosh bojh lada hua hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai bhai. Koi nahi bolta par sab andar se ro rahe hote hain is sheher mein. Mere jaise kayi aur honge jinka kal daaw par laga hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirrored the duration and exhaustion of holding this facade (Lens D).
text: Bahar se roz majboot dikhne ke is lambe bojh ko apne andar itne waqt tak dabaye rakhna, wakayi mein thaka dene wala ban chuka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan thak gaya hoon bas. Par abhi rote rehne se ghar thodi na chalega. Main soch bhi nahi paa raha, batao kya karoon main aage?

text: Do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain abhi: Ya toh is bheed bhare metro station se nikalkar bahar khuli hawa mein kisi kone mein baith jao thodi der, ya phir phone nikalkar check karo ki normal bank account mein aakhiri balance kitna bacha hai? Kaun sa better lag raha hai?

text: Pehle dheere dheere sidhiyon ya escalator se station ke bahar niklo... phir ek shant si jagah dekh kar dhoop mein baith jao... bas itna hi karna hai abhi.

text: Dono ki duty thi mere upar. Mujhe bas sab theek rakhna tha, akele kamati hoon toh socha tha income badh jayegi, par main hi unki sabse badi problem ban gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the profound exhaustion and helplessness of bearing dual duties alone (C5 + Duty-Based/Sequential).
text: Lagta hai ki akele maa aur beti dono ke farz ko nibhate nibhate tum buri tarah thak chuki ho, aur us responsibility ke dabaav mein hui ek galti ne tumhe bilkul asahay aur laachar kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho aap. Main sach mein bahut thak gayi hoon sab kuch akele bear karte karte. Kisi ko bata bhi nahi sakti apno ke alawa.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the cultural reality of single mothers seeking higher returns out of sheer desperation.
text: Akele poore ghar ki financial zimmedari uthane ke dabaav mein, aur Papa ki medical need ke chalte crypto jaise raaste dhoondhna bahut aam baat hai aaj kal. Tumhari niyat sirf apne parivaar ki bhalai thi, is financial loss se tumhari lagan aur mehnat galat nahi ho jati.

speaker: Seeker
text: Niyat toh meri unhe acchi life dene ki hi thi. Lekin ab jo nuksaan hua hai, uski wajah se lagta hai main sab kuch haar chuki hoon aur raste band hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Sharing a brief systemic anecdote to reduce personal stigma around crypto losses for single mothers.
text: Single mothers mein apne bacchon ki economic precarity door karne ke liye aise investments ka trap bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj use laalach ya buri maa hone ka naam de deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein, ye samaj kabhi hamari majboori nahi dekhta. Lekin ab is darr se niklu kaise, mujhe theek hona hai aur raasta nikalna hai, batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, immediate actionable options to break the panic cycle.
text: Is bhari darr ko thoda kam karne ke liye, hum do asaan kadam le sakte hain. Ya toh apne phone se wo crypto trading wali app abhi delete kar do, ya sirf kitchen mein jakar ek glass paani pee lo. Dono mein se abhi kya karna theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main wo app abhi delete kar deti hoon, usko dekh kar hi mera rona ruk hi nahi raha tha aur dimaag kharab ho raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Guiding the chosen step securely and simply.
text: Pehle apne phone mein us app par click karo… phir uninstall dabao… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kar diya delete usko. Thodi si himmat aayi hai us icon ko screen se hatakar. Pata nahi main kaise fas gayi usme.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the crypto trap systematically to reduce personal failure stigma.
text: Ye crypto market aur digital trading platforms banaye hi is tarah jate hain ki mehnat karne wale log apni choti bachat usme jaldi returns ke liye daal dein. Yeh ek bada economic system hai jo logo ki zarurat ka fayda uthata hai, isme tumhari akalmandi ki koi kami nahi thi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki ye baat dimaag ko thoda shant kar rahi hai. Soch rahi hoon kal office mein HR se salary advance ke liye request kar doon Papa ki dawai ke naam par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Checking on the feasibility of this helpful proactive step.
text: Agle hafte tak ke zaroori kharchon ko sambhalne ke liye HR se advance lene ka yeh plan abhi kaisa lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wo theek rahega. EMI aur dawai ka adjust ho jayega thoda. Kam se kam ek direction toh mili ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her taking charge of her duties practically (Lens B).
text: HR se baat karke Papa ke liye paise ka bandobast karna, ek zimmedar beti aur maa hone ka sach mein ek kaafi majboot kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal office jaakar sabse pehle yahi kaam karungi. Thodi raat baaki hai, main bas ab bacchon ko dekhne ja rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting her to find rest and grounding before the next day.
text: Kal office jane se pehle, aaj raat ko bacchon ke paas thoda aaram se waqt bitane ke alawa aur kya karogi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas unko apne paas sula kar khud bhi thodi der let jaungi. Unko sote hue dekh kar hi aaram milta hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the comfort of her relational connection with her children (Lens C).
text: Apne bacchon ke paas sukoon se letna is waqt tumhari sabse badi rahat aur himmat ki jagah lag rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wahi toh meri aakhiri umeed hain. Unki wajah se hi toh main roz uth kar duty karti hoon. Haar nahi manungi main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Encouraging reflection on the strength she gains from them.
text: Unke us masoom chehre ko yaad karke, abhi apne baare mein kaisa mehsoos ho raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Lag raha hai ki badi galti zarur hui hai mujhse, par main unke liye is galti ko theek bhi kar lungi apne dum par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the shift in emotion from overwhelming panic to clear resilience (Lens F).
text: Yeh sun kar lag raha hai ki woh pehli wali ghabrahat ab ek nayi shakti aur umeed mein badal chuki hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul, ab dimaag shant hai. Main kal nayi shuruaat karungi. Shukriya mera sath dene ke liye is sabse mushkil waqt mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Summarizing the path ahead using a time/duration lens softly (Lens D).
text: Aage ke aane wale kal ki taraf is naye bharose aur shanti ke sath badhna, tumhare is lamba safar ko thoda aasan zarur banayega.
